label: Damage def float factor
description: A float multiplier keyed by damage type. Uses literal key and value child elements, matching the RimWorld Dictionary<DamageDef, float> XML serialization.

key.label: Damage def
key.description: The damage type this factor applies to.

value.label: Factor
value.description: Float multiplier applied when the damage type matches. Values below 1 reduce the chance; 0 means this part cannot be targeted by that damage type.
